chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1992 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.06.2022 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G Sindh Additional Director General Law ECP (Khurram Shahzad), Law Officer ECP (Zaheer Abbas) & Regional Election Commissioner Hyderabad(Ali Abdullah Khalid) *** Learned counsel for the petitioner has challenged the order dated 26.05.2022, passed by the Appellate Authority/District & Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad, whereby nomination papers of petitioner were rejected on account of fact that he is a ‘defaulter’. It is made clear under Section 60 of the Election Act, 2017, which is also covered by Article 63 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, that no ‘defaulter’ can participate in election wrongfully. Therefore, we find no infirmity in the impugned order, which has rightly found the petitioner as ‘defaulter’ and as such this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
